task_name: Define Builder Live Read Probe Contract
goal: Define a read-only Builder Live Read Probe contract with mock fallback before any live probe implementation.
claims: BP-021 defines a read-only live probe contract without implementation.
The contract allows only evidence, artifacts, task audit, bridge audit, and metrics reads.
The contract requires mock fallback, no secrets in repo, no writes, no persistence, no execution, and no automatic approval.
assumptions: Live probing is a boundary and must be contracted before code.
No live URL or secret is available in this task.
No runtime, package, tool, or example change is required.
dod: The document defines read-only allowlist, blocked methods, auth posture, timeout, error mapping, mock fallback, output envelope, and test requirements.
stop_conditions: Secret, API key, persistence, write, execution, or Builder mutation becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-020 identified read-only Builder Evidence/Task/Audit probing as the first safe live path, but implementation must wait for this contract.
